Appearances:
Plaintiff Alma Lorrain Augeles is present.
Attorney Daniel M. Bornstein, Esq. of Bornstein and Bornstein is present for the plaintiff.
Defendants Jason Thompson and Jerry Zealand are present.
Attorney Kyle Bassman, Esq. of Ropes & Gray is present for the defendants in limited scope.
